import io
import string

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = __list_int_push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = __list_int_push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let nums = parse_tokens(input)

match nums.get(0)
when Some(a)
  match nums.get(1)
  when Some(b)
    match nums.get(2)
    when Some(s)
      mut out = ""
      mut v = a
      mut first = true
      while v < b
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
        v = v + s
      end
      println(out)
    when None
      println("")
    end
  when None
    println("")
  end
when None
  println("")
end
